testFiles.description: Unit tests for WaveField geometry system

tests.title: init creates waves based on density and maxWaves config
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: Verifies wave count scales with density param and respects maxWaves cap. Creates WaveField instances with low (0.3) and high (1.0) density, asserts high > low, and a capped instance stays within maxWaves limit.
steps: Create WaveField with maxWaves=20 and density=0.3, count waves
Create WaveField with maxWaves=20 and density=1.0, count waves
Assert high-density count > low-density count
Create WaveField with maxWaves=8 and density=1.0, assert count <= 8

tests.title: same seed produces same initial wave configuration
tests.acceptance_criteria: Both modes reuse the same seed and audio inputs
tests.description: Two WaveField instances initialized with the same seed must produce identical wave positions, proving deterministic seeded PRNG.
steps: Create two WaveField instances
Init both with seed 'deterministic-seed' and identical defaultParams
Assert getWavePositions(a) deep-equals getWavePositions(b)

tests.title: different seeds produce different wave configurations
tests.acceptance_criteria: Both modes reuse the same seed and audio inputs
tests.description: Two WaveField instances with different seeds must produce different wave positions.
steps: Create two WaveField instances with different seeds
Assert getWavePositions(a) does not equal getWavePositions(b)

tests.title: draw does not throw with valid FrameState
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: Basic smoke test: init + draw with default params must not throw.
steps: Create and init WaveField
Call draw with a valid FrameState
Assert no exception thrown

tests.title: draw does not throw with edge-case params (zero bass, zero treble, no pointer)
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: Edge case: zero energy values and undefined pointer must not crash draw.
steps: Create and init WaveField with bassEnergy=0, trebleEnergy=0, pointerDisturbance=0
Call draw with undefined pointerX/pointerY
Assert no exception thrown

tests.title: draw does not throw at boundary parameter values
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: Stress test with extreme param combos: all-zero, all-max, and edge curveSoftness/structureComplexity values.
steps: For each boundary combo (all-zero energies, all-max energies, curveSoftness 0/1, structureComplexity 0/1):
Create WaveField, init with combo params, draw one frame
Assert no exception thrown

tests.title: bass energy influences wave amplitude
tests.acceptance_criteria: Both modes reuse the same seed and audio inputs
tests.description: Spy on ctx.lineTo to capture Y coordinates. With bassEnergy=1 the Y-range of drawn points should exceed Y-range with bassEnergy=0, proving bass drives macro motion (wave amplitude).
steps: Spy on ctx.lineTo
Draw frame with bassEnergy=0, record Y range
Clear spy, draw frame with bassEnergy=1, record Y range
Assert high-bass Y range > zero-bass Y range

tests.title: treble energy influences visual properties (stroke style or line width)
tests.acceptance_criteria: Both modes reuse the same seed and audio inputs
tests.description: Intercept strokeStyle and lineWidth setters. Draw with trebleEnergy=0 vs trebleEnergy=1 and verify that either stroke colors or line widths differ, proving treble drives shimmer.
steps: Override ctx.strokeStyle and ctx.lineWidth with recording setters
Draw with trebleEnergy=0, capture styles/widths
Draw with trebleEnergy=1, capture styles/widths
Assert either styles or widths differ between the two draws

tests.title: pointer disturbance warps wave output
tests.acceptance_criteria: Both modes reuse the same seed and audio inputs
tests.description: Spy on lineTo with pointerDisturbance=0 vs 1, both with pointer at center (0.5, 0.5). The drawn coordinates must differ, proving pointer entropy influences waves.
steps: Spy on ctx.lineTo
Draw with pointerDisturbance=0, pointer at center, capture calls
Draw with pointerDisturbance=1, pointer at center, capture calls
Assert call arrays differ

tests.title: reduced motion (low motionAmplitude) is respected
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: Compare total Y displacement between two frames at time=0 and time=1000 with motionAmplitude=0.2 vs 1.0. Low motion must produce less displacement than high motion.
steps: Create WaveField with motionAmplitude=0.2, draw two frames at different times, sum Y displacement
Create WaveField with motionAmplitude=1.0 (same seed), draw same two frames, sum Y displacement
Assert low-motion displacement < high-motion displacement

tests.title: waves use canvas stroke API (beginPath, lineTo, stroke)
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: Spy on Canvas2D stroke path methods. After draw, beginPath/lineTo/stroke must each be called. lineTo calls should be at least waveCount * 10 (sampling density).
steps: Spy on ctx.beginPath, ctx.lineTo, ctx.stroke
Init and draw one frame
Assert all three spies were called
Assert lineTo call count >= getWaveCount(field) * 10

tests.title: wave colors derive from paletteHue and paletteSaturation
tests.acceptance_criteria: Both modes reuse the same seed and audio inputs
tests.description: Intercept strokeStyle setter, draw with paletteHue=200. Filter for hsla() strings and verify each hue is within ±40 of 200 (seeded hueOffset range).
steps: Override ctx.strokeStyle to capture set values
Init with paletteHue=200, draw one frame
Filter collected styles for hsla() strings
Parse hue from each, assert circular distance from 200 <= 40

tests.title: no localStorage or cookie access during wave operations
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: Privacy guard: spy on Storage.getItem and document.cookie getter. After init + draw, neither must have been called.
steps: Spy on Storage.prototype.getItem
Override document.cookie getter with a spy
Create WaveField, init, draw one frame
Assert getItem spy not called
Assert cookie getter spy not called
Restore original descriptors

testFiles.description: Unit and integration tests for ModeManager with multiple modes

tests.title: mode manager implements GeometrySystem interface (init + draw)
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: ModeManager returned by createModeManager must expose init() and draw() matching GeometrySystem. Both must execute without throwing.
steps: Create ModeManager with two mock modes
Assert typeof init and draw are 'function'
Call init and draw, assert no throw

tests.title: initial mode is deterministic from seed
tests.acceptance_criteria: Mode choice is based on seed or elapsed time
tests.description: Two ModeManagers initialized with the same seed must select the same activeIndex.
steps: Create two ModeManagers with same seed 'same-seed'
Init both
Assert m1.activeIndex === m2.activeIndex

tests.title: different seeds can produce different initial modes
tests.acceptance_criteria: Mode choice is based on seed or elapsed time
tests.description: Over 20 different seeds, at least 2 distinct activeIndex values should appear, proving seed influences mode selection.
steps: Create 20 ModeManagers with seeds 'seed-0' through 'seed-19'
Collect activeIndex values into a Set
Assert set size >= 2

tests.title: mode switches at elapsed time boundary
tests.acceptance_criteria: Mode choice is based on seed or elapsed time
tests.description: Draw at elapsed=0 then elapsed=200000 (well past 90-180s window). Both mock modes must have received at least one draw call, proving a switch occurred.
steps: Create ModeManager with two mocks
Draw at elapsed=0
Draw at elapsed=200000
Assert both mocks have >= 1 draw call

tests.title: both modes receive the same seed on init
tests.acceptance_criteria: Both modes reuse the same seed and audio inputs
tests.description: After a mode switch, extract seed argument from all init calls across both mocks. Every call must have received the same seed string.
steps: Create ModeManager with two mocks, init with 'shared-seed'
Draw at elapsed=200000 to force switch
Collect second arg (seed) from all init calls on both mocks
Assert all seeds equal 'shared-seed'

tests.title: both modes receive same VisualParams
tests.acceptance_criteria: Both modes reuse the same seed and audio inputs
tests.description: The FrameState passed to draw must be the exact same object reference, ensuring both modes see identical audio-derived params.
steps: Create ModeManager, init, draw one frame
Get the active mock's first draw call arg[1]
Assert it is the exact FrameState object (reference equality)

tests.title: mode switch does not throw
tests.acceptance_criteria: Mode switch does not break playback
tests.description: Drawing across a switch boundary (elapsed=0 then 200000) must not throw any exceptions.
steps: Create ModeManager with two mocks
Assert draw at elapsed=0 does not throw
Assert draw at elapsed=200000 does not throw

tests.title: mode switch does not break playback — draw continues producing output
tests.acceptance_criteria: Mode switch does not break playback
tests.description: Draw 10 frames spanning 0-360s. Total draw calls across both mocks must equal 10, proving every frame produced output with no gaps.
steps: Create ModeManager with two mocks
Draw 10 frames at elapsed 0, 40000, 80000, ..., 360000
Sum draw calls from both mocks
Assert total === 10

tests.title: registry accepts multiple modes and cycles through them
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: With 3 modes, drawing at elapsed 0, 200000, 400000 should cycle through all three. Each mock must have at least one draw call.
steps: Create ModeManager with 3 mock modes
Draw at elapsed 0, 200000, 400000
Assert each mock has >= 1 draw call

tests.title: switch interval is seeded and varies by seed
tests.acceptance_criteria: Mode choice is based on seed or elapsed time
tests.description: Probe switch times for 10 different seeds by stepping 1s at a time from 89s-181s. At least 2 distinct switch times must appear, proving the interval is seeded (90-180s range).
steps: For 10 seeds, create ModeManager, probe at 1s intervals from 89000-181000
Record the elapsed time at which activeIndex changes
Collect distinct switch times
Assert >= 2 unique switch times

tests.title: mode manager works with real ParticleField and WaveField
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: End-to-end integration: create ModeManager with actual ParticleField and WaveField factories. Init and draw at 0, 100s, 200s must all succeed without throwing.
steps: Dynamic import createParticleField and createWaveField
Create ModeManager with real factories
Init with 'integration-seed'
Draw at elapsed 0, 100000, 200000
Assert no exceptions thrown

tests.title: no localStorage or cookie access during mode management
tests.acceptance_criteria: A second mode is implemented
tests.description: Privacy guard for mode manager: spy on storage and cookie access across init, draw, and mode switch. Neither must be accessed.
steps: Spy on Storage.prototype.getItem and document.cookie getter
Create ModeManager, init, draw at 0, draw at 200000 (forces switch)
Assert neither spy called
Restore descriptors

patterns.mockGeometry: { init: vi.fn(), draw: vi.fn() } matching GeometrySystem interface
